user_story: As a shopper, I want to see featured products on the home page, so that I can start browsing immediately.
expected_behaviour: Grid of up to 8 products; skeleton while loading; a coherent empty/first-run state instead of a titled void when there are zero products.
test_result: fail: heading+View-all rendered above an absent grid when empty
error_detail: ProductsGridContent returned null on empty while the heading/'View all' still rendered, leaving a titled void on a fresh store.
fix_summary: ProductsGridContent renders a coherent empty-state card when zero products; heading moved inside Suspense so it never sits above a void.

user_story: As a shopper, I want to see a product's images, price, description and specs, so that I can evaluate it.
expected_behaviour: Media gallery, streamed price, description and metafields render; missing product 404s; placeholders while loading.
test_result: pass: 404 on missing; sections stream with Suspense fallbacks

user_story: As a shopper, I want to pick size/color, so that I buy the exact variant I want.
expected_behaviour: Option pickers update price/media; selection in URL; unavailable combos disabled.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want to add a product to my cart, so that I can purchase it.
expected_behaviour: Optimistic add with feedback; when no variant is resolved the CTA shows a disabled 'Select options' state, not disappear.
test_result: fail: BuyButtons returned null with no variant
error_detail: With no variant the entire buy block returned null, silently vanishing.
fix_summary: BuyButtons no longer returns null; buttons disable and Add-to-cart reads 'Select options'.
retest_result: pass: check-types+build green; disabled CTA renders

user_story: As a shopper, I want a one-click buy, so that I can check out fast.
expected_behaviour: Buy-now adds and redirects to /checkout; disabled coherently with no variant.
test_result: pass (shares CTA hardened in F004)

user_story: As a shopper, I want related/bundle/'pairs with' products, so that I discover more.
expected_behaviour: Sections render when present and hide cleanly when absent.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want to browse all collections, so that I can navigate by category.
expected_behaviour: Grid of collection cards; empty state; a route-level loading state while the blocking fetch resolves.
test_result: fail: awaited data directly, no loading state
error_detail: getCollectionsListing awaited directly with no loading.tsx; navigation showed a frozen click.
fix_summary: Added app/collections/loading.tsx so navigation shows a loader while the fetch resolves.

user_story: As a shopper, I want to filter a collection by category/brand, so that I narrow to what I want.
expected_behaviour: Facet sidebar shows real facet values with counts; active-filter badge reflects selection.
test_result: pass: real facets returned

user_story: As a shopper, I want to sort results, so that I see the most relevant order.
expected_behaviour: Sort select offers supported orders; current sort visible.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want results to load as I scroll, so that browsing is fluid.
expected_behaviour: Infinite-scroll grid; clear empty state; load-more indicator.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want a single 'all products' view, so that I can browse everything.
expected_behaviour: Same shell as a collection; same error boundary as /collections/[handle].
test_result: fail: no error.tsx, inconsistent with [handle]
error_detail: /collections/all lacked the error boundary /collections/[handle] has.
fix_summary: Added app/collections/all/error.tsx (and loading.tsx) mirroring the [handle] boundary.

user_story: As a shopper, I want to search the catalog, so that I find a specific product.
expected_behaviour: Query label, count, grid; explicit no-results with query echoed; skeleton.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want to filter and sort search results, so that I refine them.
expected_behaviour: Filter sheet + active-count + sort with visible state.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want to change quantities or remove items, so that I control my order.
expected_behaviour: Optimistic qty/remove and totals; a backend error must be distinguishable from an empty cart.
test_result: fail: getCart withFallback → error renders empty cart
error_detail: withFallback(getCart(),undefined) turned any failure into the empty-cart screen; same in nav icon.
fix_summary: Removed withFallback from cart page and nav cart icon so backend errors throw to the route error boundary.
retest_result: pass: build green; error no longer masked

user_story: As a shopper, I want to apply a discount code, so that I pay less.
expected_behaviour: A valid code reduces the total; invalid shows a clear error; not a dead-end.
test_result: fail: updateCartDiscountCodes is a no-op; total never changes
error_detail: DEFERRED (no small fix): the 0.10 OpenAPI has no cart-level discount endpoint; updateCartDiscountCodes is a documented no-op (promotions apply at checkout). The wired UI can't succeed without a backend surface — hide the code field or add a cart-discount API upstream.

user_story: As a shopper, I want to move from cart to checkout, so that I can pay.
expected_behaviour: Checkout button prepares checkout and navigates; disabled while updating.
test_result: pass: disabled-while-updating

user_story: As a shopper with an empty cart, I want a helpful empty state, so that I know what to do next.
expected_behaviour: Empty state with a path back; shown only when truly empty (see F014).
test_result: pass (false-empty fixed under F014)

user_story: As a shopper, I want to enter my shipping address, so that my order can ship.
expected_behaviour: Address form with inline validation; empty cart redirects to /cart.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want to pay securely, so that I complete my purchase.
expected_behaviour: Stripe Payment Element confirms; errors inline; a server failure has an error boundary.
test_result: fail: no app/checkout/error.tsx
error_detail: A server throw mid-checkout had no route boundary and fell to the root — jarring at the worst moment.
fix_summary: Added app/checkout/error.tsx (and loading.tsx).

user_story: As a shopper, I want confirmation of my order, so that I trust it went through.
expected_behaviour: Confirmation shows the real order verified against the backend, not values trusted from URL params.
test_result: fail: order number/status read only from URL
error_detail: Order number/status came solely from searchParams; a forged ?order= showed a fake confirmation.
fix_summary: Confirmation verifies the order number against backend GET /api/orders/{idOrNumber} before displaying.
retest_result: pass: build green; backend verification added

user_story: As a shopper, I want to learn about the store, so that I trust it.
expected_behaviour: Real store copy, not placeholder lorem.
test_result: fail: shipped literal placeholder copy
error_detail: About page shipped literal 'replace it with your own story' copy.
fix_summary: Replaced placeholder About copy with real store copy.

user_story: As a returning customer, I want to sign in, so that I can access my account and orders.
expected_behaviour: Email/password with inline errors and pending; success → /account.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a new customer, I want to create an account, so that I can track orders.
expected_behaviour: Name/email/password with validation and pending; success → /account.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a signed-in customer, I want to see my profile and sign out, so that I manage my account.
expected_behaviour: Profile renders; sign-out works; a profile fetch error shows an error state, not silent dashes.
test_result: fail: profile error → undefined → silent dashes
error_detail: getCustomerProfile returned undefined on error; overview rendered '—' with no error signal.
fix_summary: getCustomerProfile now throws on API error; account/error.tsx renders a real error state.

user_story: As a signed-in customer, I want my order history, so that I can review past purchases.
expected_behaviour: List linking to detail; genuine empty state; a fetch error distinguishable from empty.
test_result: fail: getCustomerOrders returned [] on error
error_detail: A failed fetch rendered the identical 'no orders yet' empty state.
fix_summary: getCustomerOrders throws on API error; account/orders/error.tsx + loading.tsx added.

user_story: As a signed-in customer, I want to see an order's line items and shipping, so that I know what I bought.
expected_behaviour: Order detail shows line items, shipping address and money totals.
test_result: fail: lineItems always [] and shippingAddress always null
error_detail: getCustomerOrder hardcoded lineItems:[] and shippingAddress:null; the core 'what did I buy' job was unmet.
fix_summary: getCustomerOrder now parses lineItems and shippingAddress from the response.
retest_result: pass: build green; parses real data

user_story: As a shopper, I want a fast search modal, so that I can jump to products.
expected_behaviour: Dialog with debounced predictive results, keyboard nav, loading skeleton, no-results, 'view all'.
test_result: pass

user_story: As a shopper, I want a live cart count and quick overlay, so that I track my cart anywhere.
expected_behaviour: Live count + overlay; a fetch error must not silently render as an empty cart.
test_result: fail: cart icon withFallback → error shows 0
error_detail: Nav cart icon wrapped getCart in withFallback; a backend error rendered a 0/empty badge.
fix_summary: Removed withFallback from the nav cart icon (paired with F014).

user_story: As a customer, I want the header to reflect whether I'm signed in, so that I know my state.
expected_behaviour: Account control indicates signed-in vs signed-out.
test_result: fail: static icon regardless of auth state
error_detail: Auth-blind icon; a logged-in user got no name/logout affordance.
fix_summary: AccountLink reads getCustomerSession; shows a signed-in vs signed-out affordance.

user_story: As a shopper, when something fails, I want a graceful error/empty/loading experience, so that I'm not stranded.
expected_behaviour: Styled route error boundaries; localized 404; loading affordance on data-blocking navigation; consistent coverage.
test_result: fail: zero loading.tsx; inconsistent error boundaries
error_detail: No loading.tsx anywhere; error boundaries present on some routes and absent on others.
fix_summary: Added loading.tsx + error.tsx across account/*, checkout, collections, collections/all — consistent coverage.

user_story: As an operator, I want to sign in, so that I can manage the store.
expected_behaviour: Validated against porulle + ADMIN_EMAILS; inline errors, pending; success → overview.
test_result: pass: allowlist enforced pre-auth

user_story: As an operator, I want at-a-glance store stats, so that I gauge health.
expected_behaviour: Cards render; revenue excludes cancelled/refunded.
test_result: fail: revenue summed ALL orders incl. cancelled/refunded
error_detail: Revenue had no status filter; cancelled/refunded inflated the KPI.
fix_summary: Revenue/avg-order now exclude cancelled and refunded orders.

user_story: As an operator, I want a searchable product table with archive, so that I manage the catalog.
expected_behaviour: Table sort/search/status-facet; row Edit; Archive confirms before destroying visibility.
test_result: fail: Archive fired immediately, no confirm
error_detail: Archive ran on click with no confirmation — accidental catalog-hiding.
fix_summary: Archive gated behind the reusable ConfirmAction dialog.

user_story: As an operator, I want to create a product, so that I can sell it.
expected_behaviour: Inline required/validation + server error surfacing; pending; success redirects.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to edit a product's core fields, so that I keep it accurate.
expected_behaviour: Updates attrs/price/status; slug read-only post-create; 404 if missing; inline validation.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to set brand and categories, so that products are organized.
expected_behaviour: Brand set + category toggles optimistic with rollback; empty-categories state; toasts.
test_result: pass: optimistic + rollback

user_story: As an operator, I want to add option types and generate variants, so that I sell size/color.
expected_behaviour: Add option type + generate with pending/toast; empty-options state.
test_result: pass (remove-variant is a nicety, not a defect)

user_story: As an operator, I want to upload a featured image, so that the product looks right.
expected_behaviour: Multipart upload with pending; post-upload preview reflects the stored URL, not a local blob.
test_result: fail: preview used a local blob: URL
error_detail: Preview set to a blob: URL; image looked saved but vanished on reload.
fix_summary: Preview now uses the stored URL returned by the upload action.
retest_result: pass: build green; uses stored URL

user_story: As an operator, I want to set on-hand stock, so that inventory is accurate.
expected_behaviour: Set-stock writes on-hand with toast.
test_result: pass (hardcoded reason is minor)

user_story: As an operator, I want a low-stock list, so that I reorder in time.
expected_behaviour: Low-stock products linking to edit; explicit well-stocked empty state.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to list and fuzzy-look-up orders, so that I find them fast.
expected_behaviour: Table search/status-facet + fuzzy lookup with Clear; empty state.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to create a manual/draft order, so that I can sell offline.
expected_behaviour: Debounced search, add/remove lines, live totals, create → detail; customer/address selection and real charges; numeric-safe qty.
test_result: fail: hardcoded charges, no customer/address, NaN qty
error_detail: PARTIAL: qty NaN fixed (empty→1). REMAINING (deferred, multi-screen build): hardcoded tax/discount/shipping and no customer/address selection require a customer picker, address form and a tax/shipping calculator.
fix_summary: Qty input coerces empty/NaN to 1.

user_story: As an operator, I want to advance an order's status, so that it moves through fulfillment.
expected_behaviour: Only valid next states; terminal says so; cancel/refund transitions confirm.
test_result: fail: cancel/refund fired with no confirm
error_detail: Irreversible cancel/refund transitions fired immediately.
fix_summary: Cancel/refund transitions gated behind ConfirmAction.

user_story: As an operator, I want to capture or refund payment, so that I manage money correctly.
expected_behaviour: Capture/Refund per status; Refund confirms (irreversible) with a meaningful reason.
test_result: fail: Refund fired with no confirm; reason hardcoded
error_detail: Refund (irreversible money movement) ran on click; reason hardcoded.
fix_summary: Refund gated behind ConfirmAction; reason passed from the dialog.

user_story: As an operator, I want to fulfill orders and add tracking, so that customers get their goods.
expected_behaviour: Create a fulfillment with tracking; and post-create order line-item edits.
test_result: fail: fulfillment read-only; line-item edit view-models unwired
error_detail: DEFERRED (multi-component build): backend has POST /api/orders/{id}/fulfillments and line-item endpoints, but building the create-fulfillment UI (carrier/tracking/line selection) and wiring add/update/remove line-item actions to the detail page is a several-screen effort.

user_story: As an operator, I want a searchable customer list, so that I find a customer.
expected_behaviour: Table with name search, row → detail; empty state.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want a customer's contact, orders and notes, so that I support them.
expected_behaviour: Contact + orders + add/list notes with empty states, validation, toasts; 404 if missing.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to create and archive/restore categories, so that I organize catalog.
expected_behaviour: Create with validation; archive/restore (reversible) with badge; empty state.
test_result: pass (archive is reversible → no confirm needed)

user_story: As an operator, I want to create and delete brands, so that I manage brands.
expected_behaviour: Create with validation; delete confirms (destructive); empty state.
test_result: fail: delete brand fired with no confirm
error_detail: Hard DELETE ran from a trash icon with no confirmation.
fix_summary: Delete brand gated behind ConfirmAction.

user_story: As an operator, I want to create and deactivate promotions/coupons, so that I run offers.
expected_behaviour: Create with type/value/code + validation; deactivate confirms; active/inactive badge; empty state.
test_result: fail: deactivate fired with no confirm
error_detail: Deactivating a live coupon ran on click with no confirmation.
fix_summary: Deactivate gated behind ConfirmAction.

user_story: As an operator, I want to schedule a store-wide sale, so that prices drop for a window.
expected_behaviour: Sale form validates name/dates/value and creates a modifier; created sale visible under pricing-modifiers.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to list and delete pricing modifiers, so that I control sales.
expected_behaviour: List with validity/active; delete confirms; a fetch error not masquerading as empty.
test_result: fail: delete no confirm; list error swallowed to []
error_detail: Delete fired with no confirmation and list errors swallowed to the empty state.
fix_summary: Delete gated behind ConfirmAction; listPricingModifiers now throws on error.

user_story: As an operator, I want to retry failed jobs and resolve stuck compensations, so that I keep the system healthy.
expected_behaviour: Two lists with counts, Retry/Resolve, pending-disable, toasts, all-clear empty states.
test_result: pass

user_story: As an operator, I want to issue and manage gift cards, so that I sell/redeem them.
expected_behaviour: Manage gift cards via the 0.10 giftcards API; or the nav must not promise it.
test_result: fail: nav item leads to a non-functional stub
error_detail: DEFERRED (no backend): the 0.10 OpenAPI does not contain /api/giftcards; the user story requires an API that does not exist. Either wait for the endpoint or remove the nav item until then.

user_story: As an operator, I want to view and edit tax classes/rates, so that tax is correct.
expected_behaviour: Display AND create/edit/delete tax classes/rates; list errors distinguishable from empty.
test_result: fail: read-only; list errors swallowed to []
error_detail: PARTIAL: listTaxClasses/Rates now throw on error (false-empty fixed). REMAINING (multi-component build): the screen is display-only; create/edit/delete forms for classes and rates need new action functions, form components and page mutations (backend POST endpoints exist).
fix_summary: listTaxClasses/Rates throw on API error instead of returning [].

user_story: As an operator, I want to view and edit shipping zones/rates, so that shipping is correct.
expected_behaviour: Display AND create zone/add rate; list errors distinguishable from empty.
test_result: fail: read-only; list errors swallowed to []
error_detail: PARTIAL: listShippingZones/Rates now throw on error (false-empty fixed). REMAINING (multi-component build): create-zone/add-rate forms need new actions and UI (backend POST endpoints exist).
fix_summary: listShippingZones/Rates throw on API error.

user_story: As an operator, I want to view and manage staff and roles, so that I control access.
expected_behaviour: Display AND invite-staff/assign-role; list errors distinguishable from empty.
test_result: fail: read-only; list errors swallowed to []
error_detail: PARTIAL: listStaff/Roles now throw on error (false-empty fixed). REMAINING (multi-component build): invite-staff/assign-role forms need new actions/UI (backend POST /api/admin/staff/invitations exists).
fix_summary: listStaff/Roles throw on API error.

user_story: As an operator, I want ⌘K quick search, so that I jump anywhere fast.
expected_behaviour: Debounced search with loading/no-results/prompt; hits navigate meaningfully.
test_result: fail: non-product hits dead-ended to products list
error_detail: Non-product results all navigated to /dashboard/products.
fix_summary: Non-product hits now route to their respective dashboard pages.

user_story: As an operator, I want tables that sort/filter/paginate, so that I handle large lists.
expected_behaviour: Sort/filter/paginate with reset; surfaces loading and error states, not only empty 'No results.'.
test_result: fail: no loading/error state; only empty 'No results.'
error_detail: An outage bubbled to global-error and empty read as 'No results.' with no way to tell empty from failed.
fix_summary: DataTable now accepts loading and error props and renders a spinner / error row.

user_story: As an operator, I want grouped navigation with sign-out, so that I move around and leave safely.
expected_behaviour: Sidebar groups with active-state, ⌘K shortcuts and sign-out; must not advertise non-functional stubs.
test_result: pass (gift-cards stub tracked under A024)
